# Module Name

## Purpose

What business capability this module provides.

## Owns

- Data, decisions, and invariants exclusively owned here.

## Does Not Own

- Responsibilities intentionally delegated elsewhere.

## Public Interfaces

- Commands, queries, events, schemas, and supported entrypoints.

## Dependencies

- Allowed upstream modules and external capabilities.

## Data Flow

Inputs, transformations, outputs, and lineage.

## Invariants

- Rules that must always hold and require tests.

## Failure and Fallback

Expected failures, retry policy, degradation path, and user-visible status.

## Run and Test

Minimal commands for local use and verification.

## Current Status

Current implementation location and maturity. Keep this concise.

## Known Gaps

Accepted limitations and unresolved risks.

## Change Checklist

- [ ] Public contract reviewed.
- [ ] Invariants covered by tests.
- [ ] Failure path tested.
- [ ] README or ADR updated if the boundary changed.
